# 🧠 ML Algorithms Implementation

A comprehensive collection of **Machine Learning algorithms and concepts implemented from scratch in Python**.  
This repository is designed as a learning hub — helping you understand not only how algorithms work, but also how core ML concepts like **overfitting** and **underfitting** affect model performance.

---

## 📚 Algorithms & Concepts Covered

- **Regression**
  - Linear Regression ✅
  - Logistic Regression ✅
- **Classification**
  - K-Nearest Neighbors (KNN) (coming soon)
  - Support Vector Machines (SVM) (coming soon)
  - Naive Bayes (coming soon)
- **Decision-Based**
  - Decision Trees (coming soon)
  - Random Forests (coming soon)
- **Clustering**
  - K-Means (coming soon)
  - Hierarchical Clustering (coming soon)
- **Dimensionality Reduction**
  - Principal Component Analysis (PCA) (coming soon)
- **Neural Networks**
  - Perceptron (coming soon)
  - Multi-Layer Neural Networks (coming soon)
- **Core ML Concepts**
  - Overfitting ✅
  - Underfitting ✅
  - Bias-Variance Tradeoff (planned)
  - Regularization (L1/L2) (planned)

---

## 📂 Repository Structure

│
├── LinearRegression/
│   ├── Linear_regression.ipynb
│   ├── train.csv
│   └── notes.pdf

│       ├── pairplot_best_features.png
│       └── pairplot_worst_features.png
│
├── Overfitting/
│   └── OverFitting_UnderFitting.ipynb
│
├── DecisionTrees/   # (future)
├── KNN/             # (future)
├── SVM/             # (future)
└── README.md
